traceCorrelation: none for product audit; fixture redrive evidence remains proof-only

producer: Workflow engine and scheduled job use cases
retry: worker/webhook delivery retries with bounded backoff and records exhausted attempts
dlq: dead-letter entry stores tenant, event type, attempts, payload summary, and last error; redrive uses a fresh idempotency key
retention: event rows and dead-letter evidence retained according to tenant data retention and audit policy
traceCorrelation: report.run is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.
auditRelationship: report.run is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.

producer: Webhook worker and tenant configuration mutation surfaces
retry: worker/webhook delivery retries with bounded backoff and records exhausted attempts
dlq: dead-letter entry stores tenant, event type, attempts, payload summary, and last error; redrive uses a fresh idempotency key
retention: event rows and dead-letter evidence retained according to tenant data retention and audit policy
traceCorrelation: tenant.config.changed is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.
auditRelationship: tenant.config.changed is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.
